109.description: The Institute for Justice (IJ) is a national nonprofit public-interest law firm that advocated for Kentucky's occupational licensing reforms including HB 185. IJ does not operate a Kentucky office or provide direct legal representation to most individuals—but may take select cases where government licensing rules violate economic liberty rights. If a licensing board denied your application due to a criminal record, submit your situation through IJ's online case form. For predetermination requests under HB 185, contact Kentucky DPL first.
109.description_es: El Institute for Justice (IJ) es una firma nacional de interés público que defendió las reformas de licencias ocupacionales de Kentucky, incluida HB 185. IJ no tiene oficina en Kentucky ni representa directamente a la mayoría de las personas—pero puede tomar casos selectos donde las reglas de licencia violen derechos de libertad económica. Si una junta negó su solicitud por antecedentes penales, envíe su situación por el formulario en línea de IJ. Para predeterminación bajo HB 185, contacte primero al DPL de Kentucky.
109.notes: Submit licensing denial cases at ij.org/report-abuse (no phone calls). IJ only litigates against government entities. For HB 185 predetermination, use Kentucky DPL at (502) 564-3296.
109.notes_es: Envíe casos de negación de licencia en ij.org/report-abuse (sin llamadas). IJ solo litiga contra entidades gubernamentales. Para predeterminación HB 185, use DPL de Kentucky al (502) 564-3296.
109.hours: Online case submission only; no walk-in Kentucky office
109.services: Occupational licensing reform advocacy|Select litigation against government licensing barriers|Online case intake for economic liberty violations|Kentucky HB 185 policy resources

120.description: kynect is Kentucky's official online portal to apply for Medicaid (including the Kentucky HEALTH plan), SNAP food benefits, KTAP cash assistance, childcare subsidies, and other public benefits. People leaving incarceration can enroll in Medicaid immediately upon release—and under Kentucky's federal 1115 Reentry waiver, eligible individuals may receive up to one year of Medicaid coverage plus pre-release screening starting 60 days before release. Apply online, call the helpline, or visit any DCBS office.
120.description_es: kynect es el portal oficial de Kentucky para solicitar Medicaid (incluido Kentucky HEALTH), beneficios SNAP, asistencia KTAP, subsidios de cuidado infantil y otros beneficios públicos. Las personas que salen del encarcelamiento pueden inscribirse en Medicaid inmediatamente—y bajo la exención federal 1115 de Reinserción, personas elegibles pueden recibir hasta un año de cobertura Medicaid más evaluación previa a la liberación desde 60 días antes. Solicite en línea, por teléfono o en cualquier oficina del DCBS.
120.notes: Medicaid reentry waiver: pre-release screening up to 60 days before release; one-month medication supply at release for eligible individuals. For local DCBS office, visit kynect.ky.gov or call 1-855-306-8959.
120.notes_es: Exención Medicaid de reinserción: evaluación previa hasta 60 días antes de la liberación; suministro de un mes de medicamentos al salir para elegibles. Para oficina DCBS local, visite kynect.ky.gov o llame al 1-855-306-8959.
120.hours: Online 24/7; phone support Monday–Friday during business hours
120.services: Medicaid enrollment|SNAP and KTAP applications|Childcare assistance|Pre-release Medicaid screening|Reentry health coverage navigation|DCBS office referrals

121.description: Seven Counties Services is the Community Mental Health Center (CMHC) for Jefferson, Bullitt, Henry, Oldham, Shelby, Spencer, and Trimble counties. Provides a full continuum: outpatient mental health and substance use treatment, detox, residential crisis stabilization, mobile crisis response, developmental disability services, and recovery housing. Explicitly serves justice-involved individuals including those on probation, parole, or recently released. 24/7 crisis line and 988 local team.
121.description_es: Seven Counties Services es el Centro Comunitario de Salud Mental (CMHC) para los condados Jefferson, Bullitt, Henry, Oldham, Shelby, Spencer y Trimble. Ofrece un continuo completo: salud mental ambulatoria, tratamiento de sustancias, desintoxicación, estabilización de crisis residencial, respuesta móvil de crisis, discapacidades del desarrollo y vivienda de recuperación. Sirve explícitamente a personas en el sistema de justicia. Línea de crisis 24/7 y equipo local 988.
121.notes: 24/7 Crisis: (502) 589-4313 or call/text 988. Mobile crisis available on request. Walk-in crisis support at clinic locations during business hours.
121.notes_es: Crisis 24/7: (502) 589-4313 o llame/textee 988. Crisis móvil disponible bajo solicitud. Apoyo presencial en clínicas durante horario de oficina.
121.hours: Crisis line 24/7; clinic hours vary by location
121.services: Outpatient mental health and substance use treatment|Detox and residential crisis care|24/7 mobile crisis team|988 crisis counseling|Recovery housing|IDD services

122.description: Centerstone Kentucky provides behavioral health services across the Louisville region including outpatient mental health care, substance use treatment, family and children's services, and crisis support. Multiple Louisville-area locations. 24/7 crisis line connects to trained counselors. Accepts Medicaid and most insurance. Open to adults and families including those navigating reentry, probation, or recovery.
122.description_es: Centerstone Kentucky ofrece servicios de salud conductual en la región de Louisville incluyendo salud mental ambulatoria, tratamiento de uso de sustancias, servicios familiares e infantiles y apoyo en crisis. Varias ubicaciones en el área de Louisville. Línea de crisis 24/7 conecta con consejeros capacitados. Acepta Medicaid y la mayoría de seguros.
122.notes: 24/7 Crisis Line: (855) 802-1592. Main Louisville office at 708 Magazine Street. Additional locations in Southern Indiana and Kentucky.
122.notes_es: Línea de crisis 24/7: (855) 802-1592. Oficina principal de Louisville en 708 Magazine Street.
122.hours: Crisis line 24/7; office hours vary by location
122.services: Outpatient mental health care|Substance use treatment|Family and children's services|24/7 crisis line|Medicaid and insurance billing

123.description: New Vista (formerly New Vista Behavioral Health) is the CMHC serving 17 Central Kentucky counties including Fayette, Madison, Jessamine, and Clark. Offers mental health, substance use, intellectual and developmental disability (IDD), and primary care services. Same-day Behavioral Health Urgent Care available for adults. 24/7 crisis line at 1-800-928-8000. Serves justice-involved individuals through outpatient and crisis services.
123.description_es: New Vista es el CMHC que sirve 17 condados del centro de Kentucky incluyendo Fayette, Madison, Jessamine y Clark. Ofrece salud mental, uso de sustancias, discapacidades intelectuales y del desarrollo (IDD) y atención primaria. Atención Urgente de Salud Conductual el mismo día para adultos. Línea de crisis 24/7 al 1-800-928-8000.
123.notes: 24/7 Crisis: 1-800-928-8000. Behavioral Health Urgent Care for same-day mental health needs. Serves Anderson, Bourbon, Boyle, Clark, Estill, Fayette, Franklin, Garrard, Harrison, Jessamine, Lincoln, Madison, Mercer, Nicholas, Powell, Scott, and Woodford counties.
123.notes_es: Crisis 24/7: 1-800-928-8000. Atención Urgente de Salud Conductual para necesidades el mismo día. Sirve 17 condados del centro de Kentucky.
123.hours: Crisis line 24/7; urgent care during business hours
123.services: Outpatient mental health and substance use treatment|Same-day behavioral health urgent care|IDD services|Primary care|24/7 crisis line|Mobile crisis response

124.description: NorthKey Community Care (formerly North Key) is the CMHC for Northern Kentucky serving Boone, Campbell, Kenton, Carroll, Gallatin, Grant, Owen, and Pendleton counties. Provides mental health, substance use, and developmental disability services with 24/7 crisis support. Multiple treatment centers in Covington, Newport, and surrounding NKY communities. Crisis walk-in available at Farrell Drive campus.
124.description_es: NorthKey Community Care es el CMHC del norte de Kentucky que sirve Boone, Campbell, Kenton, Carroll, Gallatin, Grant, Owen y Pendleton. Proporciona salud mental, uso de sustancias y discapacidades del desarrollo con apoyo de crisis 24/7. Varios centros de tratamiento en Covington, Newport y comunidades NKY. Crisis presencial disponible en el campus de Farrell Drive.
124.notes: 24/7 Crisis: (859) 331-3292 or toll-free (877) 331-3292. Walk-in crisis at 503 Farrell Drive, Covington. Additional locations in Newport, Falmouth, Williamstown, and Carrollton.
124.notes_es: Crisis 24/7: (859) 331-3292 o (877) 331-3292. Crisis presencial en 503 Farrell Drive, Covington.
124.hours: Crisis line 24/7; walk-in crisis during extended hours at Farrell Drive
124.services: Outpatient mental health and substance use treatment|Developmental disability services|24/7 crisis line|Walk-in crisis intervention|Residential crisis stabilization|Mobile crisis response

125.description: Call or text 988 to reach the National Suicide & Crisis Lifeline—free, confidential support 24/7 for mental health crises, emotional distress, or substance use concerns. Spanish-speaking counselors available (press 2). Veterans can press 1 for the Veterans Crisis Line. Available anywhere in Kentucky; no insurance required. Can also chat at 988lifeline.org.
125.description_es: Llame o envíe un mensaje de texto al 988 para la Línea Nacional de Prevención del Suicidio y Crisis—apoyo gratuito y confidencial 24/7 para crisis de salud mental, angustia emocional o preocupaciones por sustancias. Consejeros en español disponibles (presione 2). Veteranos presionen 1 para la Línea de Crisis para Veteranos. Disponible en todo Kentucky; no requiere seguro.
125.notes: Call or text 988. Spanish: press 2. Veterans: press 1. Deaf/hard of hearing: use preferred relay service or dial 711 then 988. Not an emergency dispatch line—for immediate physical danger, call 911.
125.notes_es: Llame o textee 988. Español: presione 2. Veteranos: presione 1. No es una línea de emergencias físicas—para peligro inmediato, llame al 911.
125.hours: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
125.services: 24/7 crisis counseling|Suicide prevention support|Substance use crisis support|Spanish-language counselors|Veterans Crisis Line connection|Online chat support

126.description: The UofL 550 Clinic is the only Ryan White-funded HIV medical clinic in Louisville, serving HIV-positive individuals in a 7-county Greater Louisville region regardless of ability to pay. Provides primary HIV care, Rapid Start treatment, PrEP, on-site pharmacy and nutrition support, mental health and substance use linkage, and Ryan White case management including housing navigation. Telehealth connects to jails through the Kentucky TeleHealth Network.
126.description_es: La Clínica 550 de UofL es la única clínica de VIH financiada por Ryan White en Louisville, que atiende a personas VIH-positivas en una región de 7 condados sin importar capacidad de pago. Ofrece atención primaria de VIH, tratamiento Rapid Start, PrEP, farmacia y nutrición en el sitio, conexión con salud mental y sustancias, y manejo de casos Ryan White incluyendo navegación de vivienda. Telesalud conecta con cárceles.
126.notes: New patient intake: (502) 625-7195. Ryan White support services office: 501 E. Broadway, Suite 140A, (502) 852-2008. Services regardless of insurance status for eligible HIV+ clients.
126.notes_es: Ingreso de pacientes nuevos: (502) 625-7195. Servicios independientemente del seguro para clientes VIH+ elegibles.
126.services: HIV primary medical care|Rapid Start treatment|PrEP clinic|Ryan White case management|Housing navigation|On-site pharmacy|Jail telehealth connections

127.description: Volunteers of America Mid-States provides HOPWA (Housing Opportunities for Persons with AIDS) emergency financial assistance for housing and utilities for low-income individuals with documented HIV/AIDS in the Louisville area. HOPWA case managers help clients achieve long-term housing stability. Note: VOA's dedicated street outreach HIV testing program ended in 2025; for free HIV testing, contact Louisville Metro Public Health Specialty Clinic at (502) 574-6699.
127.description_es: Volunteers of America Mid-States ofrece asistencia financiera de emergencia HOPWA para vivienda y servicios públicos a personas de bajos ingresos con VIH/SIDA documentado en el área de Louisville. Los gestores HOPWA ayudan con estabilidad de vivienda a largo plazo. Nota: el programa de pruebas de VIH en la calle de VOA terminó en 2025; para pruebas gratuitas, contacte la Clínica Especializada de Louisville Metro al (502) 574-6699.
127.notes: HOPWA Case Manager: (502) 635-4506. Intake scheduling: (502) 635-4522. Drop-off: 2820 W. Broadway, Suite 600. Must be at or below 80% area median income with documented HIV status.
127.notes_es: Gestor HOPWA: (502) 635-4506. Programación de ingreso: (502) 635-4522. Debe estar al 80% o menos del ingreso medio del área con estatus VIH documentado.
127.services: HOPWA emergency rent assistance|Utility payment assistance|HIV/AIDS housing stability support|Long-term housing resource navigation

128.description: AVOL (AIDS Volunteers, Inc.) is Kentucky's statewide HIV/AIDS service organization headquartered in Lexington. Provides free confidential HIV and STI testing, care coordination for people living with HIV, HOPWA and other housing assistance, prevention education, outreach, and on-site PrEP medical services. Serves individuals across Kentucky including those recently released from incarceration. Toll-free line available statewide.
128.description_es: AVOL (AIDS Volunteers, Inc.) es la organización estatal de servicios de VIH/SIDA con sede en Lexington. Ofrece pruebas gratuitas y confidenciales de VIH e ITS, coordinación de atención, asistencia de vivienda HOPWA, educación de prevención, extensión comunitaria y servicios médicos de PrEP en el sitio. Sirve a personas en todo Kentucky incluidas recién liberadas.
128.notes: Toll-free: (877) 225-9245. Free HIV/STI testing by appointment or walk-in during clinic hours. PrEP services available at Lexington office.
128.notes_es: Línea gratuita: (877) 225-9245. Pruebas gratuitas de VIH/ITS con cita o sin cita durante horario de clínica. Servicios PrEP disponibles en Lexington.
128.hours: Monday–Friday; call for testing appointment times
128.services: Free HIV and STI testing|PrEP medical services|Care coordination|HIV housing assistance|Prevention education and outreach|Statewide referrals

129.description: Louisville Metro Department of Public Health and Wellness Specialty Clinic offers HIV, syphilis, hepatitis C, gonorrhea, and chlamydia testing at 914 East Broadway, Suite 102. Free preliminary HIV screen available; sliding scale fees for full STI panels. Appointments recommended—call to schedule. Also coordinates mobile harm reduction outreach with free HIV testing at community sites across Louisville.
129.description_es: La Clínica Especializada del Departamento de Salud Pública de Louisville Metro ofrece pruebas de VIH, sífilis, hepatitis C, gonorrea y clamidia en 914 East Broadway, Suite 102. Prueba preliminar gratuita de VIH disponible; tarifas escalonadas para paneles completos de ITS. Se recomienda cita—llame para programar. También coordina extensión móvil de reducción de daños con pruebas gratuitas de VIH.
129.notes: Schedule appointments at (502) 574-6699. HIV testing hours generally 8 a.m.–4 p.m. weekdays. Mobile harm reduction sites offer additional free HIV testing—see louisvilleky.gov harm reduction page for schedule.
129.notes_es: Programe citas al (502) 574-6699. Horario de pruebas de VIH generalmente 8 a.m.–4 p.m. entre semana. Sitios móviles de reducción de daños ofrecen pruebas adicionales—consulte horario en louisvilleky.gov.
129.hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–4:00 p.m. (2nd Friday closes at 2:00 p.m.)
129.services: Free HIV screening|STI testing and treatment|Hepatitis C testing|Harm reduction outreach|Sliding scale fees|Spanish-language services

140.description: The Healing Place Men's Campus in Louisville offers free, peer-driven addiction recovery since 1989—one of the nation's largest social-model programs. Open 24/7 for detox and recovery entry. Program includes non-medical detox (3–10 days), Off the Streets motivational track, intensive Phase I peer mentoring using the SOBER180 curriculum, and transitional living. No insurance, Medicaid, or fees accepted—only a desire to get sober and in-person pre-screening required.
140.description_es: El Campus de Hombres de The Healing Place en Louisville ofrece recuperación gratuita entre pares desde 1989—uno de los programas de modelo social más grandes del país. Abierto 24/7 para desintoxicación e ingreso. Incluye desintoxicación no médica (3–10 días), pista motivacional Off the Streets, Fase I intensiva con mentores y vida transitoria. Sin seguro, Medicaid ni tarifas—solo deseo de sobriedad y evaluación presencial.
140.notes: First-come, first-served; must pre-screen in person at campus. No DOC referral required for voluntary admission. Also operates Campbellsville men's campus. Partners with Kentucky DOC for reentry RSC programs separately.
140.notes_es: Por orden de llegada; debe evaluarse en persona en el campus. No se requiere referido del DOC para admisión voluntaria. También opera campus de hombres en Campbellsville.
140.hours: Open 24/7 for detox and intake pre-screening
140.services: Free non-medical detox|Off the Streets motivational program|Phase I peer recovery|SOBER180 curriculum|Transitional living|Continuing care and employment referrals

141.description: The Healing Place Women's Campus is a free, peer-driven residential recovery program and Kentucky DOC-contracted Reentry Service Center in Louisville. Serves women 18+ with non-medical detox, Off the Streets track, intensive Phase I recovery, outpatient services, sober housing, and overnight shelter options. No cost to clients—must complete in-person pre-screening at 1503 South 15th Street. Open 24/7.
141.description_es: El Campus de Mujeres de The Healing Place es un programa de recuperación residencial gratuito entre pares y Centro de Servicios de Reinserción contratado por el DOC en Louisville. Atiende mujeres de 18+ con desintoxicación no médica, pista Off the Streets, Fase I intensiva, servicios ambulatorios, vivienda sobria y refugio nocturno. Sin costo—debe completar evaluación presencial en 1503 South 15th Street. Abierto 24/7.
141.notes: Kentucky DOC-contracted RSC for women. Same main line as men's campus: (502) 585-4848. First-come pre-screening; no fees or insurance. Burns M. Brady Center RSC operated by Healing Place is a separate DOC program.
141.notes_es: RSC contratado por el DOC para mujeres. Misma línea principal que campus de hombres: (502) 585-4848. Evaluación presencial por orden de llegada; sin tarifas ni seguro.
141.hours: Open 24/7 for detox and intake pre-screening
141.services: Free women's residential recovery|DOC-contracted RSC|Non-medical detox|Off the Streets program|Outpatient services|Sober housing|Overnight shelter

142.description: Stepworks Recovery Centers operates six Kentucky locations offering medical detox, residential (ASAM 3.5/3.7), and outpatient substance use treatment. Facilities in Elizabethtown, Bowling Green, Nicholasville, London, and Paducah. Medical detox for opioids, alcohol, and benzodiazepines; accepts most insurance including Medicaid. Single statewide access line for referrals and admissions.
142.description_es: Stepworks Recovery Centers opera seis ubicaciones en Kentucky con desintoxicación médica, tratamiento residencial (ASAM 3.5/3.7) y ambulatorio para uso de sustancias. Instalaciones en Elizabethtown, Bowling Green, Nicholasville, London y Paducah. Desintoxicación médica para opioides, alcohol y benzodiacepinas; acepta la mayoría de seguros incluido Medicaid.
142.notes: Statewide access center: (800) 545-9031. London location is men-only residential. Pregnant women accepted with OB approval. See stepworks.com/insurance for accepted plans.
142.notes_es: Centro de acceso estatal: (800) 545-9031. Ubicación de London es residencial solo para hombres. Mujeres embarazadas aceptadas con aprobación obstétrica.
142.services: Medical detox|Residential substance use treatment|Intensive outpatient|Multi-location Kentucky access|Insurance and Medicaid billing|Referral and transportation coordination

143.description: SAMHSA's FindTreatment.gov and National Helpline help locate substance use and mental health treatment anywhere in Kentucky by zip code. Filter by care type (detox, residential, outpatient), payment options (Medicaid, sliding scale, free), and telehealth. The helpline at 1-800-662-4357 is free, confidential, and available 24/7 in English and Spanish. Text HELP4U (435748) with your zip code for referrals.
143.description_es: FindTreatment.gov y la Línea Nacional de SAMHSA ayudan a localizar tratamiento de sustancias y salud mental en cualquier lugar de Kentucky por código postal. Filtre por tipo de atención (desintoxicación, residencial, ambulatorio), opciones de pago (Medicaid, escala móvil, gratuito) y telemedicina. La línea al 1-800-662-4357 es gratuita, confidencial y disponible 24/7 en inglés y español.
143.notes: Helpline: 1-800-662-4357 (TTY: 1-800-487-4889). Text zip code to 435748 (HELP4U). Does not provide direct treatment—refers to local providers. Also try KY HELP at 1-833-859-4357 for Kentucky-specific substance use referrals.
143.notes_es: Línea: 1-800-662-4357 (TTY: 1-800-487-4889). Textee código postal al 435748 (HELP4U). No proporciona tratamiento directo—refiere a proveedores locales. También pruebe KY HELP al 1-833-859-4357.
143.services: Treatment facility search by zip code|24/7 referral helpline|Payment and insurance filtering|Telehealth provider search|Spanish-language helpline support

160.description: Legal Aid Society provides free civil legal help for low-income residents in 15 Kentucky counties including Jefferson, Bullitt, Hardin, Nelson, and Shelby. Handles housing evictions, public benefits, family law, domestic violence protection, and expungement when a record blocks employment or housing. Partners with Goodwill Kentucky for expungement clinics. Offices in downtown Louisville, West Louisville (Goodwill Campus), and Shelbyville.
160.description_es: Legal Aid Society proporciona ayuda legal civil gratuita para residentes de bajos ingresos en 15 condados de Kentucky incluyendo Jefferson, Bullitt, Hardin, Nelson y Shelby. Maneja desalojos, beneficios públicos, derecho familiar, protección contra violencia doméstica y eliminación de antecedentes cuando bloquean empleo o vivienda. Colabora con Goodwill Kentucky en clínicas de eliminación.
160.notes: Toll-free: (800) 292-1862. Expungement line: (502) 614-3101. West Louisville office: 2820 W. Broadway, Ste. 300 (Mon–Thu 9 a.m.–4 p.m.). Apply online at yourlegalaid.org.
160.notes_es: Línea gratuita: (800) 292-1862. Eliminación de antecedentes: (502) 614-3101. Oficina West Louisville: 2820 W. Broadway, Ste. 300. Solicite en yourlegalaid.org.
160.hours: Main office Mon–Fri 9:00 a.m.–5:00 p.m.; West Louisville Mon–Thu 9:00 a.m.–4:00 p.m.
160.services: Free civil legal representation|Expungement assistance|Housing and eviction defense|Public benefits appeals|Family law|Domestic violence protection orders

161.description: Legal Aid of the Bluegrass provides free civil legal services for low-income individuals in 32 Central and Northern Kentucky counties including Fayette, Kenton, Boyd, and Madison. Handles expungement when criminal records block employment or housing, plus benefits, housing, family, and consumer matters. Partners with Goodwill Kentucky expungement clinics. Offices in Lexington, Covington, Ashland, and Morehead.
161.description_es: Legal Aid of the Bluegrass ofrece servicios legales civiles gratuitos para personas de bajos ingresos en 32 condados del centro y norte de Kentucky incluyendo Fayette, Kenton, Boyd y Madison. Maneja eliminación de antecedentes cuando bloquean empleo o vivienda, más beneficios, vivienda, familia y asuntos del consumidor. Colabora con clínicas de Goodwill.
161.notes: Apply online or call (859) 431-8200, Mon–Thu 10 a.m.–3 p.m. and Fri 10 a.m.–1 p.m. Expungement info at lablaw.org/criminal-record-expungement. Also offices in Covington, Ashland, Morehead.
161.notes_es: Solicite en línea o llame al (859) 431-8200, lun–jue 10 a.m.–3 p.m. y vie 10 a.m.–1 p.m. Información de eliminación en lablaw.org.
161.hours: Intake: Mon–Thu 10:00 a.m.–3:00 p.m.; Fri 10:00 a.m.–1:00 p.m.
161.services: Free civil legal services|Expungement representation|Housing and benefits cases|Family law|Consumer protection|Goodwill clinic partnership

162.description: Kentucky Legal Aid serves low-income residents in 35 western and south-central Kentucky counties including Warren, Daviess, Christian, and Hopkins. Free civil legal help with housing, public benefits, family matters, and expungement when records create employment or housing barriers. Statewide intake line routes callers to the nearest office in Bowling Green, Owensboro, or Paducah.
162.description_es: Kentucky Legal Aid sirve a residentes de bajos ingresos en 35 condados del oeste y centro-sur de Kentucky incluyendo Warren, Daviess, Christian y Hopkins. Ayuda legal civil gratuita con vivienda, beneficios públicos, asuntos familiares y eliminación de antecedentes. La línea de ingreso estatal dirige a la oficina más cercana en Bowling Green, Owensboro o Paducah.
162.notes: Statewide intake: (877) 782-4219. Bowling Green office at 1700 Destiny Lane. Partners with Goodwill expungement clinics in western Kentucky counties.
162.notes_es: Ingreso estatal: (877) 782-4219. Oficina de Bowling Green en 1700 Destiny Lane. Colabora con clínicas de Goodwill en el oeste de Kentucky.
162.hours: Intake line Mon–Fri during business hours
162.services: Free civil legal services|Expungement assistance|Housing and eviction help|Public benefits appeals|Family law|Statewide intake routing

163.description: Kentucky Legal Aid's Owensboro office provides free civil legal services for low-income residents in Western Kentucky counties including Daviess, Hancock, Henderson, and Ohio. Handles housing, benefits, family law, and expungement cases. Part of Kentucky Legal Aid's 35-county western and south-central service area—call the statewide intake line to apply.
163.description_es: La oficina de Owensboro de Kentucky Legal Aid proporciona servicios legales civiles gratuitos para residentes de bajos ingresos en condados del oeste de Kentucky incluyendo Daviess, Hancock, Henderson y Ohio. Maneja vivienda, beneficios, derecho familiar y eliminación de antecedentes. Parte del área de 35 condados—llame a la línea de ingreso estatal para solicitar.
163.notes: Statewide intake: (877) 782-4219 or local (800) 467-2260. Serves Daviess and surrounding western Kentucky counties.
163.notes_es: Ingreso estatal: (877) 782-4219 o local (800) 467-2260. Sirve Daviess y condados circundantes del oeste de Kentucky.
163.hours: Call intake line Mon–Fri for appointment
163.services: Free civil legal services|Expungement help|Housing cases|Public benefits|Family law|Statewide intake coordination

164.description: Kentucky Legal Aid's Paducah office provides free civil legal services for low-income residents in Western Kentucky's Jackson Purchase region including McCracken, Ballard, Carlisle, and Fulton counties. Handles housing, benefits, family matters, and expungement. Call the statewide intake line to apply and be connected to the appropriate western Kentucky office.
164.description_es: La oficina de Paducah de Kentucky Legal Aid proporciona servicios legales civiles gratuitos para residentes de bajos ingresos en la región Jackson Purchase del oeste de Kentucky incluyendo McCracken, Ballard, Carlisle y Fulton. Maneja vivienda, beneficios, asuntos familiares y eliminación de antecedentes. Llame a la línea de ingreso estatal para solicitar.
164.notes: Statewide intake: (877) 782-4219 or local toll-free (800) 467-2218. Serves McCracken, Ballard, Carlisle, Fulton, Graves, Hickman, Marshall, and surrounding counties.
164.notes_es: Ingreso estatal: (877) 782-4219 o local (800) 467-2218. Sirve McCracken, Ballard, Carlisle, Fulton y condados circundantes.
164.hours: Call intake line Mon–Fri for appointment
164.services: Free civil legal services|Expungement assistance|Housing and benefits cases|Family law|Western Kentucky intake
